message:
Fix Claude Code transcript showing duplicate forked sessions

Claude Code stores tool_result messages as branches in the conversation
tree, creating many

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ig0vp3w0r6a7d3033aoj7s97"leaf" endpoints per conversation. Previously, each
leaf was shown as a separate session, causing dozens of duplicate entries
for a single conversation.

Changes:
- Filter out tool_result leaves (intermediate responses, not endpoints)
- Keep only the latest leaf per conversation file
- Update test to reflect new one-session-per-file behavior

files.patch:
@@ -684,21 +684,15 @@ test('marks forked sessions and assigns branch markers', async () => {
     pricingFetcher,
   })
 
-  expect(sessions).toHaveLength(2)
-  const [latest, base] = sessions
+  // Only the latest leaf per file is kept - this matches Claude Code's behavior
+  // of showing one session per conversation file
+  expect(sessions).toHaveLength(1)
+  const [latest] = sessions
 
-  expect(latest.isFork).toBe(true)
-  expect(latest.branchMarker).toBe('┌')
-  expect(base.isFork).toBe(false)
-  expect(base.branchMarker).toBe('┴')
+  expect(latest.id).toBe(forkAssistantUuid)
+  expect(latest.isFork).toBe(false) // No forking when only one session per file
+  expect(latest.branchMarker).toBe(' ')
 
-  expect(base.tokenUsage).toEqual({
-    inputTokens: 130,
-    cachedInputTokens: 0,
-    outputTokens: 40,
-    reasoningOutputTokens: 0,
-    totalTokens: 170,
-  })
   expect(latest.tokenUsage).toEqual({
     inputTokens: 130,
     cachedInputTokens: 50,
